# Pricewise Grocery

> Pricewise is a free iPhone app for shoppers in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). It checks your grocery list for price-match deals from this week's flyers and directs you to the nearest store that will honour them — so you save on the groceries you already buy.

## Key facts
- Platform: iPhone (iOS). Free to download.
- Area served: Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada.
- Languages: 11.
- What it does: reads weekly grocery flyers, flags price-match opportunities on items already on your list, and gives directions to the nearest participating store.
- What it is NOT: it is not a "cheapest store" finder. It matches your existing cart and routes you to the nearest store that will match — it does not rank every store in the city.
- Core features: price-match finder, nearest-store directions, savings tracker, shared shopping lists, 11 languages.

## Price matching in the Greater Toronto Area
- Stores such as No Frills, FreshCo and Giant Tiger have price-match policies, each with its own rules.
- Walmart Canada ended its Ad Match program in 2020.
- Metro and Food Basics do not price-match, but their flyers can be used as proof of a lower price at stores that do.
- Price-matching is never guaranteed; each store makes the final decision.

## Links
- Website: https://jaymehta1892-prog.github.io/pricewise-site/
- Download (App Store): https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/id6770648419
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/pricewisegrocery

## Disclaimer
Pricewise Grocery is independent and not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any grocery retailer or flyer. Store names are used for identification only. Savings reflect personal experience, not a guaranteed outcome.
